ogTitle: Theresa Creek vs Thirldene: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Theresa Creek and Thirldene.
heading: Theresa Creek vs Thirldene — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Theresa Creek, New South Wales and Thirldene, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Theresa Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Thirldene (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Theresa Creek or Thirldene safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Theresa Creek has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Thirldene scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Theresa Creek scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Thirldene scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Theresa Creek or Thirldene?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Theresa Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
